'''Sochi''' was a vacation [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Poster" /> located in the [[Sochi system/Legends|Sochi system]] within [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] maintained the camp known as [[Troopers' Rest]] on Sochi, where Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who reached retirement age were eventually sent.<ref name="Poster" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sochi was created by [[Anthony Fredrickson]] for "[[Soldiers of the Empire!]]," an article included in the [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 4|fourth issue]] of [[Paradise Press]]'s ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly]]'' magazine,<ref name="Poster" /> published in [[January]] [[1978]].<ref name="Date">{{WebCite|url=https://www.theforce.net/timetales/misc/arcana/arcana-1978.asp|text=TheForce.Net - Time Tales -  Arcana Historica - 1978|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20220626044001}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Sochi [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square M-9.<ref name="TEA" />
